note: Arquivo de dados legível do Travellers Rest Guide. O site usa data.js para carregar no navegador; este JSON fica aqui para edição/consulta no GitHub.

tools.name: Bucket
tools.use: Draw water from the well; refill systems and recipes.

tools.name: Mop
tools.use: Clean messes; test on fragile obstacles like boxes, barrels and vases.

tools.name: Iron Pickax
tools.recipe: Copper Pickax + 30 Iron Bar + 60 Wooden Planks
tools.use: Recommended first upgrade for Ore Galore progression.

tools.name: Cobalt Pickax
tools.recipe: Iron Pickax + 45 Cobalt Bar + 40 Noble Wooden Planks

tools.name: Iron Axe
tools.recipe: Copper Axe + 30 Iron Bar + 60 Wooden Planks
tools.use: Second recommended upgrade for terrain cleanup.

tools.name: Cobalt Axe
tools.recipe: Iron Axe + 45 Cobalt Bar + 40 Noble Wooden Planks

vendors.name: Woody
vendors.sells: Blueprints, recipes and ready-made items for editing the tavern.

vendors.name: Hallmund
vendors.sells: Copper tools and upgrades to Iron/Cobalt tools.

vendors.name: Kujaku
vendors.sells: Fish, including Oily Fish options depending on stock.

vendors.name: Nessy
vendors.sells: Pet items, Jacky quest and adoption path.

locations.name: The Mine
locations.notes: Unlock after freeing Ferro. Daily regenerating mine floors with ores and chests.

locations.name: The Burrow
locations.notes: Markus and Nessy; Jacky quest; cat adoption path.

locations.name: River Bank
locations.notes: Freshwater fish location, useful for Oily Fish candidates.

materials.name: Queen Bee
materials.get: Rare drop from mature trees outside tavern

fish.name: Oily Fish
fish.notes: Includes Trout, Piranha, Salmon, Eel, Anchovy, Gilt-Head Bream, Sea Bass and Sardine.

fish.name: Anchovy
fish.notes: Good early target if season matches.

quests.name: Unlock the Mine / Ferro
quests.notes: Reach hot springs, use hot water to free Ferro, then mine unlocks.

quests.name: Jacky the Cat
quests.notes: Talk to Nessy at The Burrow; find Jacky under a cart, in a barrel, then in a tree behind a bench.
